title: pleopeltis membranacea
intro: Pleopeltis membranacea is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the membranous polypody or rock cap fern. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Pleopeltis membranacea include wound healing, reducing pain and inflammation, and treating various infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
